description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:7.2 Docker image and no services. Add a before_script that updates apt, installs gnupg, zlib1g-dev, libpng-dev, sets up Node.js 8.x, installs nodejs, installs the PHP zip extension, downloads Composer and runs php composer.phar install, then runs npm install. Enable caching of the vendor/ and node_modules/ directories. Define a pages job in the deploy stage that runs npm run production followed by mv build_production public, publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact, and only executes on the master branch.
